events.text: Goal! Netherlands 1, Sweden 0. Brian Brobbey (Netherlands) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Cody Gakpo with a cross.
Goal! Netherlands 2, Sweden 0. Brian Brobbey (Netherlands) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Denzel Dumfries with a cross.
Substitution, Netherlands. Crysencio Summerville replaces Donyell Malen.
Goal! Netherlands 3, Sweden 0. Cody Gakpo (Netherlands) left footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Denzel Dumfries with a cross.
Gabriel Gudmundsson (Sweden) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Netherlands 4, Sweden 0. Cody Gakpo (Netherlands) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Crysencio Summerville following a fast break.
Substitution, Sweden. Anthony Elanga replaces Alexander Bernhardsson.
Substitution, Sweden. Besfort Zeneli replaces Jesper Karlström.
Substitution, Sweden. Lucas Bergvall replaces Benjamin Nygren.
Goal! Netherlands 4, Sweden 1. Anthony Elanga (Sweden) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Alexander Isak with a through ball following a fast break.
Substitution, Netherlands. Teun Koopmeiners replaces Frenkie de Jong.
Substitution, Netherlands. Guus Til replaces Tijjani Reijnders.
Substitution, Netherlands. Memphis Depay replaces Brian Brobbey.
Yasin Ayari (Sweden) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Sweden. Taha Ali replaces Yasin Ayari.
Lucas Bergvall (Sweden) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Netherlands 5, Sweden 1. Crysencio Summerville (Netherlands) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Memphis Depay.
Substitution, Netherlands. Noa Lang replaces Cody Gakpo.
Substitution, Sweden. Elliot Stroud replaces Gabriel Gudmundsson.
